episodes.title: Whiteboard Analysis: Warren Jeffs and the FLDS Cult Timeline Explained
episodes.description:
This video covers the historical development of Mormon fundamentalism known as the Fundamental Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-Day Saints (FLDS), the origins and practice of plural marriage, the formation the FLDS following the LDS Church's abandonment of polygamy, the rise of the FLDS Church, and the leadership, criminal cases, and legacy of Warren Jeffs.

This video is for educational and informational purposes only.

──────────────

CONTENT WARNINGS
Religious extremism • Cult dynamics • Polygamy • Child marriage • Sexual abuse • Grooming • Coercive control • Family separation • Psychological abuse  • Imprisonment • Death • Suicide • Self Harm

VIewer discretion is advised.

──────────────

SUPPORT RESOURCES
If you are struggling with thoughts of self-harm or suicide, or if you have experienced sexual assault, abuse, or exploitation, support resources are listed below.

Crisis Support:
• 988 Suicide & Crisis Lifeline
• Call or Text 988
https://988lifeline.org

Sexual Assault Support
• RAINN National Sexual Assault Hotline
• 800-656-HOPE (4673)
• Text HOPE to 64673
https://rainn.org/hotline

If you are in immediate danger, call 911 or your local emergency services.

──────────────
